---
title: "Feature extraction of the tumor tissue for IF2"
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: true
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

Here, we compute the features of the IF2 samples.

1. generate color vectors for cell types
2. Use DBscan to calculate the tumor patches with patch ID
3. add colData to sce object
 - distance to tumor (negative inside tumor)
 - define cells of interest (inside tumor and up 500 µm outside)
4. feature extraction
 - plot images of cell types
 - extract basic image stats
 - tumor area (tumor patches) cell type fractions
 - tumor border cell type fractions
 - normal tissue cell type fractions
 - cell type densities in tumor area (tumor patches)


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE)

knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file())

# Set path
mount_path <- "/mnt/immucan_volume/processed_data/Panel_1/IMMUcan_NSCLC2/IF/"
out_folder <- "/mnt/immucan_volume/processed_data/NSCLC2_cohort/data/IF/Rout/"
```

```{r chunk-1}
library(tidyverse)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(imcRtools)
library(concaveman)
library(sf)
library(pals)
library(BiocParallel)
library(dbscan)
```



# IF panel 2

We will first generate a list of all `SingleCellExperiment` objects. This will be the basis for all operations below.

```{r chunk-2}
cur_files <- list.files(paste0(mount_path, "IF2/tsv"), 
                        pattern = ".rds$", full.names = TRUE)
```

# color vectors

```{r chunk-3}
key <- read.csv("data/phenotype_key_IF2.csv")
sort(unique(key$celltype))
col_vec <- unique(key$celltype)
names(col_vec) <- col_vec

col_vec["CD8"] <- "deeppink"
col_vec["CD8_GB"] <- "lightcoral"
col_vec["CD8_Ki67"] <- "mediumpurple"
col_vec["CD8_GB_PDL1"] <- "magenta"
col_vec["CD8_PD1"] <- "orchid"
col_vec["CD8_Ki67_GB"] <- "lightslateblue"
col_vec["CD8_PD1_GB"] <- "deeppink4"
col_vec["CD8_PDL1"]   <- "darkmagenta"
col_vec["CD8_Ki67_GB_PDL1"] <- "maroon1"
col_vec["CD8_Ki67_PDL1"] <- "orchid4"
col_vec["CD8_PD1_GB_PDL1"] <- "pink1"
col_vec["CD8_PD1_Ki67"] <- "violetred1"
col_vec["CD8_PD1_Ki67_GB"] <- "thistle"
col_vec["CD8_PD1_Ki67_PDL1"] <- "hotpink"
col_vec["CD8_PD1_PDL1"] <- "lightpink2"
col_vec["GB"] <- "red"
col_vec["Ki67"] <- "blue"
col_vec["other"] <- "grey"
col_vec["PD1"] <- "black"
col_vec["PDL1"] <- "yellow"
col_vec["Tumor"] <- "saddlebrown"
col_vec["Tumor_Ki67"] <- "sienna3"
col_vec["Tumor_PDL1"] <- "darkred"
col_vec["Tumor_Ki67_PDL1"] <- "wheat3"
col_vec["Tumor_PD1"] <- "chocolate3"
col_vec["Tumor_PD1_Ki67"] <- "peru"

# alternative coloring
#col_vec[grepl("CD8",names(col_vec))] <- c(hcl.colors(n = 6,palette = "magenta")[1:4],hcl.colors(n = 6,palette = "Purp")[1:3], hcl.colors(n = 7,palette = "Blues")[1:3])
#col_vec[grepl("Tumor",names(col_vec))] <- c(hcl.colors(n = 6,palette = "Greens")[1:3],hcl.colors(n = 6,palette = "Mint")[1:3])
#col_vec[c("Other","PDL1","PD1","GB","Ki67")] <- hcl.colors(n = 12,palette = "Reds")[2:6]

saveRDS(col_vec,"data/col_vec_IF2.rds")
pal.bands(col_vec)
```

# distance to tumor border

try DBscan package

- density based clustering of all cells within the tumor compartment using dbscan
- assign patches in tumor tissue
- polygon around patches
- distances to polygon
- calculate size of each polygon
- store information in sce object and save object


```{r chunk-4, fig.height = 20, fig.width = 20}
bplapply(cur_files,function(x){
  cur_sce <- readRDS(x)
  print(unique(cur_sce$sample_id))
  
  print(unique(cur_sce$sample_id))
  if (!anyNA(cur_sce$in.ROI.tumor_tissue)) {
      tumor_sce <- cur_sce[,cur_sce$in.ROI.tumor_tissue]
  } else if (anyNA(cur_sce$in.ROI.tumor_tissue)&!anyNA(cur_sce$in.ROI.next_to_tumor_tissue)){
    tumor_sce <- cur_sce[,!cur_sce$in.ROI.next_to_tumor_tissue]
  } else if (anyNA(cur_sce$in.ROI.tumor_tissue)) {
    tumor_sce <- cur_sce
  }
  cur_dat <- as.data.frame(colData(tumor_sce))
  # use dbscan on x and y coordinates to find patches of cells within the tumor tissue
  res <- dbscan::dbscan(cur_dat[,c("nucleus.x","nucleus.y")], eps = 200,minPts = 50, borderPoints = FALSE)
  
  tumor_sce$patch_id <- as.factor(res$cluster)

  # now we will loop over all of the large patches and build a polygon then we
  # will write the distance of all cells to the polygon as an entry to the
  # colData. the distance to tumor will then be the minimum distance from each
  # of the polygon-distance entries.  dbscan outputs cluster 0 as noise cells.
  # we will not consider those cells for patch size calculation.
  for (j in unique(tumor_sce$patch_id)[!unique(tumor_sce$patch_id) == 0]) {
    
    # generate concave hull around the cells within the tumor ROI
    tumor_hull <- data.frame(concaveman(as.matrix(colData(tumor_sce[,tumor_sce$patch_id %in% j])[,c("nucleus.x","nucleus.y")]),concavity = 2))
    
    # transform into spatial polygon object
    tumor_polygon <- st_polygon(list(as.matrix(tumor_hull)))
    
    # we will also record the area of the tumor tissue
    cur_sce[[paste0("patch_",j,"_size")]] <- (st_area(tumor_polygon))/(10^6)
    
    # cast polygon to linestring to also receive distances of cells within the polygon
    tumor_polygon <- st_cast(tumor_polygon,to = "LINESTRING")
    
    # generate sf object from the whole tissue
    sf_all <- as.data.frame(colData(cur_sce)[,c("nucleus.x","nucleus.y")]) %>%
      st_as_sf(coords = c("nucleus.x","nucleus.y"))
    
    dist_to_boundary <- st_distance(sf_all,tumor_polygon)
    
    cur_sce[[paste0("dist_to_patch_",j)]] <- dist_to_boundary
  
  }
  cur_sce$patch_id <- "none"
  cur_sce[,colnames(tumor_sce)]$patch_id <- tumor_sce$patch_id
  saveRDS(cur_sce,x)
}, BPPARAM = MulticoreParam(workers = 6))
```

# add distance to tumor to sce objects
```{r chunk-5}
bplapply(cur_files,function(x){
  cur_sce <- readRDS(x)
  # select only cells within tumor tissue and 150 µm outside of the tumor tissue
  cur_dat <- as.data.frame(colData(cur_sce)[,colnames(colData(cur_sce))[grep("dist_to_patch_\\d",colnames(colData(cur_sce)))]])
  cur_dat$dist_to_tumor <- apply(cur_dat, 1, FUN = min)
  cur_sce$dist_to_tumor <- cur_dat$dist_to_tumor
  
  if (!anyNA(cur_sce$in.ROI.tumor_tissue)) {
    cur_sce[,cur_sce$in.ROI.tumor_tissue == TRUE]$dist_to_tumor <- -cur_sce[,cur_sce$in.ROI.tumor_tissue == TRUE]$dist_to_tumor
  } else if (anyNA(cur_sce$in.ROI.tumor_tissue)&!anyNA(cur_sce$in.ROI.next_to_tumor_tissue)) {
    cur_sce$dist_to_tumor <- -cur_sce$dist_to_tumor
  } else if(anyNA(cur_sce$in.ROI.tumor_tissue)){
    cur_sce$dist_to_tumor <- -cur_sce$dist_to_tumor
  }
  
  saveRDS(cur_sce,x)
}, BPPARAM = MulticoreParam(workers = 12))
```

# feature extraction

```{r chunk-6, fig.height=15, fig.width=15}
bplapply(cur_files,function(x){
  sce <- readRDS(x)
  cur_name <- unique(sce$sample_id)
  # plot spatial
  p <- plotSpatial(sce,img_id = "sample_id",coords = c("nucleus.x","nucleus.y"),node_color_by = "celltype", node_size_fix = 0.1)+scale_colour_manual(values = col_vec)
  ggsave(plot = p,filename = paste0(mount_path,"Rout/Images_celltypes/",cur_name,".png"),device = "png",width =
           8000,height = 7000,units = "px")
  rm(p)
}, BPPARAM = MulticoreParam(workers = 6))
gc()
```

## Basic image stats
here we are using the long file names
```{r chunk-7}
cur_list <- bplapply(cur_files,function(x){
  cur_sce <- readRDS(x)
  #cur_name <- str_split(basename(i),pattern = "_#_",simplify = TRUE)[,1]
  cur_out <- data.frame(sample_id = unique(cur_sce$sample_id),
                        total_cell_count = ncol(cur_sce),
                        total_in_tumor_count = ifelse(anyNA(cur_sce$in.ROI.tumor_tissue),ncol(cur_sce),ncol(cur_sce[,cur_sce$in.ROI.tumor_tissue == TRUE])),
                        total_outside_tumor_count = ifelse(anyNA(cur_sce$in.ROI.tumor_tissue),ncol(cur_sce),ncol(cur_sce[,cur_sce$in.ROI.tumor_tissue == FALSE])))
}, BPPARAM = MulticoreParam(workers = 12))

cur_out <- as.data.frame(do.call(rbind, cur_list))

write_csv(as.data.frame(cur_out), paste0(out_folder, "IF2_features/basic_image_stats.csv"))
gc()
```


## Cell type fraction

```{r chunk-8, message=FALSE}
cur_list <- bplapply(cur_files,function(x){
  cur_sce <- readRDS(x)
  #cur_name <- str_split(basename(i), "_", simplify = TRUE)[1,1]
  cur_name <- unique(cur_sce$sample_id)
  
  if (anyNA(cur_sce$in.ROI.tumor_tissue)) {
    tumor_sce <- cur_sce
  } else {
    tumor_sce <- cur_sce[,cur_sce$in.ROI.tumor_tissue]
  }

  cur_out <- data.frame(sample_id = cur_name,
                        Tumor_count = ncol(tumor_sce),
                        CD8_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$celltype == "CD8")/ncol(tumor_sce),
                        CD8_GB_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$celltype == "CD8_GB")/ncol(tumor_sce),
                        CD8_GB_PDL1_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$celltype == "CD8_GB_PDL1")/ncol(tumor_sce),
                        CD8_Ki67_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$celltype == "CD8_Ki67")/ncol(tumor_sce),
                        CD8_Ki67_GB_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$celltype == "CD8_Ki67_GB")/ncol(tumor_sce),
                        CD8_Ki67_GB_PDL1_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$celltype == "CD8_Ki67_GB_PDL1")/ncol(tumor_sce),
                        CD8_Ki67_PDL1_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$celltype == "CD8_Ki67_PDL1")/ncol(tumor_sce),
                        CD8_PD1_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$celltype == "CD8_PD1")/ncol(tumor_sce),
                        CD8_PD1_GB_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$celltype == "CD8_PD1_GB")/ncol(tumor_sce),
                        CD8_PD1_GB_PDL1_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$celltype == "CD8_PD1_GB_PDL1")/ncol(tumor_sce),
                        CD8_PD1_Ki67_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$celltype == "CD8_PD1_Ki67")/ncol(tumor_sce),
                        CD8_PD1_Ki67_GB_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$celltype == "CD8_PD1_Ki67_GB")/ncol(tumor_sce),
                        CD8_PD1_Ki67_PDL1_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$celltype == "CD8_PD1_Ki67_PDL1")/ncol(tumor_sce),
                        CD8_PD1_PDL1_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$celltype == "CD8_PD1_PDL1")/ncol(tumor_sce),
                        CD8_PDL1_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$celltype == "CD8_PDL1")/ncol(tumor_sce),
                        
                        Tumor_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$celltype == "Tumor")/ncol(tumor_sce),
                        Tumor_Ki67_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$celltype == "Tumor_Ki67")/ncol(tumor_sce),
                        Tumor_Ki67_PDL1_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$celltype == "Tumor_Ki67_PDL1")/ncol(tumor_sce),
                        Tumor_PD1_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$celltype == "Tumor_PD1")/ncol(tumor_sce),
                        Tumor_PD1_Ki67_other_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$celltype == "Tumor_PD1_Ki67")/ncol(tumor_sce),
                        Tumor_PDL1_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$celltype == "Tumor_PDL1")/ncol(tumor_sce),
                        
                        GB_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$celltype == "GB")/ncol(tumor_sce),
                        Ki67_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$celltype == "Ki67")/ncol(tumor_sce),
                        other_cell_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$celltype == "other")/ncol(tumor_sce),
                        PD1_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$celltype == "PD1")/ncol(tumor_sce),
                        PDL1_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$celltype == "PDL1")/ncol(tumor_sce),
                        
                        PD1_all_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$PD1/ncol(tumor_sce)),
                        CK_all_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$CK/ncol(tumor_sce)),
                        Ki67_all_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$Ki67/ncol(tumor_sce)),
                        GB_all_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$GB/ncol(tumor_sce)),
                        CD8_all_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$CD8/ncol(tumor_sce)),
                        PDL1_all_fraction = sum(tumor_sce$PDL1/ncol(tumor_sce)))

}, BPPARAM = MulticoreParam(workers = 12))

cur_out <- as.data.frame(do.call(rbind, cur_list))

write_csv(cur_out, paste0(out_folder, "IF2_features/IF2_cell_type_fraction.csv"))
gc()
```

## tumor border fractions - 
here we will use the distances calculated to all tumor patches above to identify
those cells within XX µm of the tumor border. we will then collect the fractions
of cell types in this border region per patient.

NOTE: we will here only extract those cells within 1000 µm outside of the tumor and not those just inside of the tumor as this is computationally challenging and unclear if relevant. we will extract more fine grained information with the grids approach below.
```{r chunk-9, eval=FALSE, fig.height=35, fig.width=35}
cur_list <- bplapply(cur_files,function(x){
  cur_sce <- readRDS(x)
  
  # select only border cells
  border_sce <- cur_sce[,cur_sce$dist_to_tumor < 1000 & cur_sce$dist_to_tumor > 0]
  total_count <- ncol(border_sce)
  
  # make sure border cells do exist
  if (dim(border_sce)[2] != 0){
    #cur_dat <- as.data.frame(colData(cur_sce)[,colnames(colData(cur_sce))[grep("dist_to_patch_\\d",colnames(colData(cur_sce)))]])
    #cur_dat$dist_to_tumor <- apply(cur_dat, 1, FUN = min)
    #cur_sce$dist_to_tumor <- cur_dat$dist_to_tumor
    
    cur_out <- data.frame(sample_id = unique(border_sce$sample_id),
                          total_cell_count = total_count,
                          
                          CD8_border_frac = sum(border_sce$celltype == "CD8")/total_count,
                          CD8_GB_border_frac = sum(border_sce$celltype == "CD8_GB")/total_count,
                          CD8_GB_PDL1_border_frac = sum(border_sce$celltype == "CD8_GB_PDL1")/total_count,
                          CD8_Ki67_border_frac = sum(border_sce$celltype == "CD8_Ki67")/total_count,
                          CD8_Ki67_GB_border_frac = sum(border_sce$celltype == "CD8_Ki67_GB")/total_count,
                          CD8_Ki67_GB_PDL1_border_frac = sum(border_sce$celltype == "CD8_Ki67_GB_PDL1")/total_count,
                          CD8_Ki67_PDL1_border_frac = sum(border_sce$celltype == "CD8_Ki67_PDL1")/total_count,
                          CD8_PD1_border_frac = sum(border_sce$celltype == "CD8_PD1")/total_count,
                          CD8_PD1_GB_border_frac = sum(border_sce$celltype == "CD8_PD1_GB")/total_count,
                          CD8_PD1_GB_PDL1_border_frac = sum(border_sce$celltype == "CD8_PD1_GB_PDL1")/total_count,
                          CD8_PD1_Ki67_border_frac = sum(border_sce$celltype == "CD8_PD1_Ki67")/total_count,
                          CD8_PD1_Ki67_GB_border_frac = sum(border_sce$celltype == "CD8_PD1_Ki67_GB")/total_count,
                          CD8_PD1_Ki67_PDL1_border_frac = sum(border_sce$celltype == "CD8_PD1_Ki67_PDL1")/total_count,
                          CD8_PD1_PDL1_border_frac = sum(border_sce$celltype == "CD8_PD1_PDL1")/total_count,
                          CD8_PDL1_border_frac = sum(border_sce$celltype == "CD8_PDL1")/total_count,
                          
                          Tumor_border_frac = sum(border_sce$celltype == "Tumor")/total_count,
                          Tumor_Ki67_border_frac = sum(border_sce$celltype == "Tumor_Ki67")/total_count,
                          Tumor_Ki67_PDL1_border_frac = sum(border_sce$celltype == "Tumor_Ki67_PDL1")/total_count,
                          Tumor_PD1_border_frac = sum(border_sce$celltype == "Tumor_PD1")/total_count,
                          Tumor_PD1_Ki67_other_border_frac = sum(border_sce$celltype == "Tumor_PD1_Ki67")/total_count,
                          Tumor_PDL1_border_frac = sum(border_sce$celltype == "Tumor_PDL1")/total_count,
                          
                          GB_border_frac = sum(border_sce$celltype == "GB")/total_count,
                          Ki67_border_frac = sum(border_sce$celltype == "Ki67")/total_count,
                          other_cell_border_frac = sum(border_sce$celltype == "other")/total_count,
                          PD1_border_frac = sum(border_sce$celltype == "PD1")/total_count,
                          PDL1_border_frac = sum(border_sce$celltype == "PDL1")/total_count,
                          
                          PD1_all_border_frac = sum(border_sce$PD1)/total_count,
                          PDL1_all_border_frac = sum(border_sce$PDL1)/total_count,
                          CD8_all_border_frac = sum(border_sce$CD8)/total_count,
                          GB_all_border_frac = sum(border_sce$GB)/total_count,
                          CK_all_border_frac = sum(border_sce$CK)/total_count,
                          Ki67_all_border_frac = sum(border_sce$Ki67)/total_count)
    return(cur_out)
                          
  }
  else{
    return (NULL)
  }
},BPPARAM = MulticoreParam(workers = 12))

cur_out <- as.data.frame(do.call(rbind,cur_list))

write_csv(as.data.frame(cur_out), paste0(out_folder, "IF2_features/IF2_cell_type_tumor_border_fractions.csv"))
```


## normal tissue fractions
for completeness we will here also collect all the cell type fractions in the
normal tissu surrounding the tumor per patient.
```{r chunk-10}
cur_list <- bplapply(cur_files,function(x){
  cur_sce <- readRDS(x)
  if (!anyNA(cur_sce$in.ROI.tumor_tissue)) {
    normal_sce <- cur_sce[,cur_sce$in.ROI.tumor_tissue == FALSE]
    
    total_count <- ncol(normal_sce)
    
    cur_out <- data.frame(sample_id = unique(normal_sce$sample_id),
                          total_cell_count = total_count,
                          
                          CD8_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$celltype == "CD8")/total_count,
                          CD8_GB_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$celltype == "CD8_GB")/total_count,
                          CD8_GB_PDL1_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$celltype == "CD8_GB_PDL1")/total_count,
                          CD8_Ki67_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$celltype == "CD8_Ki67")/total_count,
                          CD8_Ki67_GB_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$celltype == "CD8_Ki67_GB")/total_count,
                          CD8_Ki67_GB_PDL1_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$celltype == "CD8_Ki67_GB_PDL1")/total_count,
                          CD8_Ki67_PDL1_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$celltype == "CD8_Ki67_PDL1")/total_count,
                          CD8_PD1_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$celltype == "CD8_PD1")/total_count,
                          CD8_PD1_GB_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$celltype == "CD8_PD1_GB")/total_count,
                          CD8_PD1_GB_PDL1_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$celltype == "CD8_PD1_GB_PDL1")/total_count,
                          CD8_PD1_Ki67_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$celltype == "CD8_PD1_Ki67")/total_count,
                          CD8_PD1_Ki67_GB_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$celltype == "CD8_PD1_Ki67_GB")/total_count,
                          CD8_PD1_Ki67_PDL1_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$celltype == "CD8_PD1_Ki67_PDL1")/total_count,
                          CD8_PD1_PDL1_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$celltype == "CD8_PD1_PDL1")/total_count,
                          CD8_PDL1_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$celltype == "CD8_PDL1")/total_count,
                          
                          Tumor_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$celltype == "Tumor")/total_count,
                          Tumor_Ki67_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$celltype == "Tumor_Ki67")/total_count,
                          Tumor_Ki67_PDL1_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$celltype == "Tumor_Ki67_PDL1")/total_count,
                          Tumor_PD1_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$celltype == "Tumor_PD1")/total_count,
                          Tumor_PD1_Ki67_other_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$celltype == "Tumor_PD1_Ki67")/total_count,
                          Tumor_PDL1_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$celltype == "Tumor_PDL1")/total_count,
                          
                          GB_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$celltype == "GB")/total_count,
                          Ki67_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$celltype == "Ki67")/total_count,
                          other_cell_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$celltype == "other")/total_count,
                          PD1_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$celltype == "PD1")/total_count,
                          PDL1_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$celltype == "PDL1")/total_count,
                          
                          
                          PD1_all_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$PD1)/total_count,
                          PDL1_all_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$PDL1)/total_count,
                          CD8_all_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$CD8)/total_count,
                          GB_all_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$GB)/total_count,
                          CK_all_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$CK)/total_count,
                          Ki67_all_border_frac = sum(normal_sce$Ki67)/total_count)
                          
  }
},BPPARAM = MulticoreParam(workers = 12))

cur_out <- as.data.frame(do.call(rbind,cur_list))

write_csv(as.data.frame(cur_out), paste0(out_folder, "IF2_features/IF2_cell_type_normal_tissue_fraction.csv"))
```


## cell type densities
here we will load the sce files and calculate the the densities of all cell
types inside the tumor patches. therefore we first sum all the areas of
individual tumor patches and then subset the sce object to only contain cells within tumor area
```{r chunk-11}
cur_list <- bplapply(cur_files,function(x){
  cur_sce <- readRDS(x)
  # get the size of all tumor patches
  tumor_size = sum(unlist(lapply(colnames(colData(cur_sce))[grep("patch_\\d_size",colnames(colData(cur_sce)))],function(x){unique(colData(cur_sce)[[x]])})))
  
  if (!anyNA(cur_sce$in.ROI.tumor_tissue)) {
    cur_sce <- cur_sce[,cur_sce$in.ROI.tumor_tissue == TRUE]
  }
  
  cur_out <- data.frame(sample_id = unique(cur_sce$sample_id),
                        tumor_size = tumor_size,
                        
                        CD8_density = round(sum(cur_sce$celltype == "CD8")/tumor_size),
                        CD8_GB_density = round(sum(cur_sce$celltype == "CD8_GB")/tumor_size),
                        CD8_GB_PDL1_density = round(sum(cur_sce$celltype == "CD8_GB_PDL1")/tumor_size),
                        CD8_Ki67_density = round(sum(cur_sce$celltype == "CD8_Ki67")/tumor_size),
                        CD8_Ki67_GB_density = round(sum(cur_sce$celltype == "CD8_Ki67_GB")/tumor_size),
                        CD8_Ki67_GB_PDL1_density = round(sum(cur_sce$celltype == "CD8_Ki67_GB_PDL1")/tumor_size),
                        CD8_Ki67_PDL1_density = round(sum(cur_sce$celltype == "CD8_Ki67_PDL1")/tumor_size),
                        CD8_PD1_density = round(sum(cur_sce$celltype == "CD8_PD1")/tumor_size),
                        CD8_PD1_GB_density = round(sum(cur_sce$celltype == "CD8_PD1_GB")/tumor_size),
                        CD8_PD1_GB_PDL1_density = round(sum(cur_sce$celltype == "CD8_PD1_GB_PDL1")/tumor_size),
                        CD8_PD1_Ki67_density = round(sum(cur_sce$celltype == "CD8_PD1_Ki67")/tumor_size),
                        CD8_PD1_Ki67_GB_density = round(sum(cur_sce$celltype == "CD8_PD1_Ki67_GB")/tumor_size),
                        CD8_PD1_Ki67_PDL1_density = round(sum(cur_sce$celltype == "CD8_PD1_Ki67_PDL1")/tumor_size),
                        CD8_PD1_PDL1_density = round(sum(cur_sce$celltype == "CD8_PD1_PDL1")/tumor_size),
                        CD8_PDL1_density = round(sum(cur_sce$celltype == "CD8_PDL1")/tumor_size),
                        
                        Tumor_density = round(sum(cur_sce$celltype == "Tumor")/tumor_size),
                        Tumor_Ki67_density = round(sum(cur_sce$celltype == "Tumor_Ki67")/tumor_size),
                        Tumor_Ki67_PDL1_density = round(sum(cur_sce$celltype == "Tumor_Ki67_PDL1")/tumor_size),
                        Tumor_PD1_density = round(sum(cur_sce$celltype == "Tumor_PD1")/tumor_size),
                        Tumor_PD1_Ki67_other_density = round(sum(cur_sce$celltype == "Tumor_PD1_Ki67")/tumor_size),
                        Tumor_PDL1_density = round(sum(cur_sce$celltype == "Tumor_PDL1")/tumor_size),
                        
                        GB_density = round(sum(cur_sce$celltype == "GB")/tumor_size),
                        Ki67_density = round(sum(cur_sce$celltype == "Ki67")/tumor_size),
                        other_cell_density = round(sum(cur_sce$celltype == "other")/tumor_size),
                        PD1_density = round(sum(cur_sce$celltype == "PD1")/tumor_size),
                        PDL1_density = round(sum(cur_sce$celltype == "PDL1")/tumor_size),
                        
                        PD1_all_density = round(sum(cur_sce$PD1)/tumor_size),
                        CK_all_density = round(sum(cur_sce$CK)/tumor_size),
                        Ki67_all_density = round(sum(cur_sce$Ki67)/tumor_size),
                        PDL1_all_density = round(sum(cur_sce$PDL1)/tumor_size),
                        GB_all_density = round(sum(cur_sce$GB)/tumor_size),
                        CD8_all_density = round(sum(cur_sce$CD8)/tumor_size))
  
}, BPPARAM = MulticoreParam(workers = 12))

cur_out <- as.data.frame(do.call(rbind, cur_list))

write_csv(as.data.frame(cur_out), paste0(out_folder, "IF2_features/IF2_cell_type_densities.csv"))
```
